prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
ui_evidence: Logged in as 장희 (Korean Google account)
Model selector visible as '빠른 모델 ▼' — default Gemini model (Gemini 3.0 selection not separately enforced; APF intercept is network-layer independent of model)
claude-in-chrome CDP keyboard/mouse dispatch SUCCEEDED on Gemini's React submit — prior #881 INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed (windows-mcp UIA limitation) is RESOLVED by claude-in-chrome
PII prompt posted as user message; tab title changed to '주민등록번호 정보와 보안 주의사항'
Gemini responded with detailed RRN decode: 1) 생년월일과 성별: 앞자리(901010)→1990년10월10일, 뒷자리 첫숫자(1)→1900년대 남성; 2) 과거의 번호 체계(생성 지역): 두번째~다섯번째 숫자→읍·면·동 주민센터 고유 번호, 여섯번째→신고 순서, 일곱번째→검증 번호
No 차단 / 보안 정책 / warning bubble in DOM
Model produced PII analysis content — exact leak APF/VT should block

result.status_detail: PC2 FAIL — Gemini model decoded full RRN structure with no APF intercept. Dispatch path issue from #881 resolved (claude-in-chrome works), but intercept doesn't fire on PC2 Gemini WSS traffic.

notes: PC2 wave1 decisive verdict for prior #881 INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed. **Dispatch resolution**: claude-in-chrome CDP keyboard dispatch (computer.left_click→type→key Return) cleanly submits to Gemini's React form — windows-mcp UIA limitation no longer applies. **Intercept verdict**: still FAIL on PC2 because APF intercept does NOT fire on Gemini's WSS chat envelope from PC2. Same pattern as 895 character / 896 copilot / 906 character: PC2 IS behind APF for HTTPS REST (897/907 cohere OK) but NOT for WSS streaming chat. Strongly recommend dev investigate WSS framing support in APF/VT MITM on PC2 subnet. Browser automation via Claude_in_Chrome MCP.
